events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: removing temporary bracing before decking/permanent stability is in place is a critical OSHA 1926 Subpart R violation and an unstable-structure hazard, so this fails inspection despite being ~70% physically complete — bracing must be restored and the frame re-inspected before erection can proceed.
